# Source and Codex migration

- **Source bundle:** `marketingskills-main`
- **Source path:** `skills/social`
- **Integrated pack:** `2026-07-03.1`
- **License status:** See `LICENSE.source.txt` when present.

## Migration notes

Agent Skills source was already partly Codex-aware. Claude fallback paths were removed, shared tool links were redirected to the bundled vendor registry, and external side effects are gated by prerequisite and approval checks.
